scope: Partial migration (docs/migration/quarantine.json): only the forms stream is declarative Tier-1. questions and submissions require a per-form fan_out whose id list is EITHER the configured form_id OR discovered via GET /forms depending on runtime config -- the engine's fan_out.ids_from is a static, load-time choice between config_key and request (mutually exclusive, never a runtime fallback), so this conditional cannot be expressed without silently diverging from legacy for one of the two accepted input shapes. Those two streams remain on the legacy internal/connectors/fillout implementation.

excluded.reason: questions stream blocked: ENGINE_GAP, fan_out.ids_from has no config_key-else-request fallback mode; see docs/migration/quarantine.json
submissions stream blocked: ENGINE_GAP, fan_out.ids_from has no config_key-else-request fallback mode; see docs/migration/quarantine.json
